faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Disney Solitaire
faq.description: Have another question? Contact our support team!

items.title: What is Disney Solitaire?
items.description: Disney Solitaire is a magical card game that combines classic solitaire gameplay with beloved Disney characters and themes. Play traditional solitaire with beautifully designed Disney character cards and special power-ups.

items.title: Is Disney Solitaire free to play?
items.description: Yes! The basic version of Disney Solitaire is completely free to play. Premium features and additional content are available through optional in-app purchases.

items.title: How do I unlock new Disney characters and card designs?
items.description: You can unlock new Disney content by completing levels, participating in daily challenges, and collecting achievements. Premium content is also available with the Premium Pass.

items.title: Can I play Disney Solitaire offline?
items.description: Yes! Once downloaded, Disney Solitaire can be played without an internet connection. However, some features like leaderboards and daily challenges require internet connectivity.
